name: IdsEdwProdDsgnSumFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cteLeft AS ( SELECT DISTINCT PROD.PROD_SK, dbo.trim_default(PROD.PROD_ID) AS PROD_ID, COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1920-01-01' AS PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROD PROD JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON PROD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE PROD.PROD_SK NOT IN (0,1) UNION SELECT DISTINCT 0 AS PROD_SK,'UNK' AS PROD_ID,'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD,'1753-01-01' AS PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROD PROD UNION SELECT DISTINCT 1 AS PROD_SK,'NA' AS PROD_ID,'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD,'1753-01-01' AS PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROD PROD ), cteRight AS ( SELECT DISTINCT PROD_SK, MIN(PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK) AS PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT PROD_CMPNT.PROD_SK, PROD_CMPNT.PROD_ID, COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, MIN(PROD_CMPNT.PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK) AS PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROD_CMPNT PROD_CMPNT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON PROD_CMPNT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.BNF_SUM_DTL BNF ON BNF.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID=PROD_CMPNT.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM1 ON CM1.CD_MPPNG_SK=PROD_CMPNT.PROD_CMPNT_TYP_CD_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM2 ON CM2.CD_MPPNG_SK=BNF.BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK GROUP BY PROD_CMPNT.PROD_ID, PROD_CMPNT.PROD_SK, CD1.TRGT_CD, CM1.TRGT_CD, CM2.TRGT_CD HAVING CM1.TRGT_CD='BSBS' AND CM2.TRGT_CD='CLNC' UNION SELECT DISTINCT PROD_CMPNT.PROD_SK, PROD_CMPNT.PROD_ID, COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, MIN(PROD_CMPNT.PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK) AS PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROD_CMPNT PROD_CMPNT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON PROD_CMPNT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM1 ON CM1.CD_MPPNG_SK=PROD_CMPNT.PROD_CMPNT_TYP_CD_SK GROUP BY PROD_CMPNT.PROD_ID, PROD_CMPNT.PROD_SK, CD1.TRGT_CD, CM1.TRGT_CD HAVING CM1.TRGT_CD='UPP' ) X GROUP BY PROD_SK, PROD_ID, SRC_SYS_CD ), cteJoin AS ( SELECT L.PROD_SK, L.PROD_ID, L.SRC_SYS_CD, L.PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK, R.PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK FROM cteLeft L LEFT JOIN cteRight R ON L.PROD_SK = R.PROD_SK ), cteXfm1 AS ( SELECT cteJoin.*, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default( CASE WHEN cteJoin.PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN cteJoin.PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK ELSE '' END ) <> '' THEN DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(cteJoin.PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK AS DATE)) ELSE '9999-12-31' END AS svPreviousDt FROM cteJoin ), cteXfm2 AS ( SELECT PROD_SK, PROD_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN CAST(PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK AS DATE) <> '1753-01-01' THEN svPreviousDt ELSE '1753-01-01' END AS svProdCmpntTermDt FROM cteXfm1 ) SELECT cteXfm2.PROD_SK, cteXfm2.PROD_ID, cteXfm2.PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK, cteXfm2.svProdCmpntTermDt AS PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK, 'NA' AS SPIRA_BNF_ID, 'NA' AS UPP_XREF_ID, cteXfm2.SRC_SYS_CD FROM cteXfm2

Annotations:
All product extract from prod and prod_cmpnt table
This file contains the default inserts for all products and will be funneled with Spira and Upp extract in job IdsEdwProdDsgnSumFXfm
Job:
IdsEdwProdDsgnSumFExtr
Table:
 PROD_DSGN_SUM_F      
Pull the matched set of products from IDS and move to EDW.
